overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a vibrant autumn forest, transitioning through rocky terrain to a riverside path, with dramatic mountain peaks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense autumn forest trail with red foliage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along winding dirt path surrounded by dense red and orange autumn trees

entered.detail: tall trees with vibrant red and orange autumn foliage lining the path
tall trees with vibrant red and orange autumn foliage lining the path
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the forest
steep rocky slope covered with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense autumn forest with vibrant red and orange foliage. The protagonist walks steadily along a winding dirt path flanked by tall trees, with a rocky hillside visible to the right and distant mountains barely visible through the canopy.

events.description: forest canopy opens up revealing expansive sky and large snow-capped mountain peaks in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along path as the terrain opens to reveal a dramatic mountain vista ahead

entered.detail: trees with golden yellow autumn leaves replacing the red foliage
trees with golden yellow autumn leaves replacing the red foliage
large rocky mountain with clouds around its summit becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wide clearing with full sky visibility, revealing a dramatic mountain peak in the distance. The foliage transitions from red to golden yellow as the path continues forward, with rocky terrain becoming more prominent on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with sparse vegetation

events.description: terrain becomes increasingly rocky with sparse dead trees and low bushes replacing the forest

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path through rocky terrain with dead trees and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: bare dead trees with twisted branches and no leaves
reddish rocky outcrops and boulders lining the path

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a rockier, more arid landscape with sparse vegetation and dead leafless trees. The path winds through reddish rock formations as the mountain peak looms closer ahead, creating a more enclosed feeling despite the open sky.

events.description: path reaches a calm river or lake with trees reflecting in the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the calm reflective water

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface showing tree reflections
trees growing along the water's edge reflected in the surface

segments.scene_description: The trail reaches a serene body of water, with the path running along a cliff edge overlooking the calm reflective surface. Trees line the far bank of the river, their reflections visible in the water, while the rocky terrain continues on the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant autumn forest that gradually transitions into a rugged, rocky landscape overlooking a serene river. It begins on a winding dirt path flanked by dense red and orange foliage, with distant mountains partially obscured by the canopy. As the forest opens into a wide clearing, the foliage shifts to golden yellow and the view expands to reveal a dramatic mountain peak under a clear sky. The scene then shifts toward a more arid environment of reddish rock formations and sparse, leafless trees, causing the mountain to loom closer as the path narrows. Finally, the trail reaches a cliff edge where the rocky terrain gives way to a calm, reflective body of water lined with distant trees.
